shippedIn: PR #16 (feat(identity): Person model + IdentityResolver), merged to main
note: All objectives and tasks shipped in main. Code: src/models/person.ts, src/services/identity-resolver.service.ts, src/lib/pr-search.ts, src/services/person-metrics-collector.ts, src/lib/spreadsheet-writer.ts, src/services/weekly-update.service.ts, skills/teamhero-weekly/, docs/METRICS_METHODOLOGY.md. This file is the historical design record.

redaction.rule: Committed files contain NO company-specific names/logins/org names. Real values live only in gitignored local data.

tasks.title: Build identity map (roster + doc fragments + noreply parse) in gitignored local data
Hand-verify golden fixture (search API + computer use) -> tests/fixtures/local/; commit redacted variant
Person model; org-search PRs; per-repo email-matched commits; LoC glob filter; reconciliation report
Write corrected PR/LoC + monthly commit columns to local xlsx; re-upload
Package weekly skill (append week block, refresh month commits, idempotent)

decisions.trackedPr: org-wide search API by author, all states, created-in-window
decisions.identityModel: Person {logins[], emails[], names[]}, union-find, no back-compat
decisions.verification: search API authoritative; computer use (Claude Code harness) as oracle for interactive/golden runs; Playwright optional cross-check for unattended runs
decisions.sheetWrite: local xlsx edit + manual re-upload (Graph deferred)
decisions.commits: per-repo enumeration all org repos, email/name local match, exclude merges, caps removed
decisions.commitsLayout: new monthly columns appended to Data sheet
decisions.loc: replace weekly LoC with filtered code-LoC
decisions.mapSeed: Data sheet roster + spec-doc fragments + noreply parse (local only)
decisions.weeklyUpdate: append new week block, refresh current-month commits, idempotent
